title: smile (CLOSED)
description:
!LOTS OF BUGS!

the mod is based on other mods: 000.jar and The Broken Script.
body:
### !!READ DESCRIPTION!!

## Before the play, read everything that is written here!!

Not a big deal... Unfortunately, this mod is being closed. I decided this because the folder with my mod (MCreator) stupidly zeroed out and I can't restore it, lol. So this mod is OFFICIALLY closed!! But don't worry, I'm creating a new, much better (probably) mod, scarier and with a cool idea. Expect some news though

1. It is better not to sleep often! Your bed may be blown up or SmileForDie may appear on your bed
2. Smile biome (strange things happen in this biome, it's better not to go there often)
3. Events that occur over time. Don't play the mod if you have a weak heart

    
   
                      While that's all, read the warning!!







<details>
<summary>!WARN!</summary>

Do not play with this mod if you are **faint of heart** or **have a weak heart**! We are **not responsible** for your life

</details>

<details>
<summary>!WARN 2!</summary>

The mod may **include screamers**, **harsh sounds**, or **escalating mobs**.

</details>

THAT'S A **HORROR MOD** 
Everything that is present in this mod is all **ARG**!!
